title: Moderation Update: Abuse Queue Triaged
body:
Completed triage of 6 reports. Actions taken:

• Banned spam_wave_42 for phishing spam (6 channels affected)
• Warned toxic_runner for targeted harassment of newcomers
• Closed 2 high-severity validated reports
• Skipped 2 trusted members per policy (trusted_helper, core_maintainer)
• Deferred 2 lower-severity reports for review

Queue status: 4 open, 2 resolved.
